title: Z-PMW | PMW Addon
description: a addon mod that enhances the PMWeather Mod Clouds and Visuals!
body:
# Z-PMW - PMWeather Visual Enhancement Addon

  Transform PMWeather storms with stunning shader enhancements!

  ## What It Does
  - **Blue-grey realistic storm clouds** with improved density and layering
  - **Bright blue lightning flashes** that illuminate the entire screen
  - **Enhanced textures** - custom noise textures for better cloud detail

  ## Requirements
  - **PMWeather 0.15.0+** (required)
  - **NeoForge 21.1.83+** (required)
  - **Minecraft 1.21.1**

  ## Performance
  - **CLIENT-SIDE ONLY** - Zero server load
  - **GPU-optimized shaders** - Minimal CPU impact
  - **Expected FPS impact:** 0-5% on modern GPUs
  - **Performance-friendly** - Runs smoothly during storms

  ## Credits
  Developed by **Dizastermann** & **XFATEX**
  Built as an enhancement for PMWeather by protomanly
